proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5 – Semantic Correctness (array lengths are non‑negative)
; LINE: 496
; Claim: `result.graph.files.length` and `result.derivation.contracts.length` are natural numbers.
(declare-const files_len Int)
(declare-const contracts_len Int)

; Code guarantees (as produced by TypeScript/JavaScript):
;   - Length of any array is a non‑negative integer.
(assert (>= files_len 0))
(assert (>= contracts_len 0))

; Negation of the claim we want to prove:
;   At least one of the lengths is negative.
(assert (or (< files_len 0) (< contracts_len 0)))

(check-sat)   ; unsat → both lengths cannot be negative.
